name: AVG
description: Calculates the average of [value] within each group determined by [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Defines the grouping scope (for example, events per attribute, all in view, etc.).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Attribute or expression to average.

name: AVGIF
description: Calculates the average of [value] for rows meeting [condition], grouped by [context]. Returns [default] when no items match.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Boolean filter applied within the context.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Value used if the condition selects no items.

name: COUNT
description: Counts rows within each group determined by [context].

name: COUNTIF
description: Counts rows that satisfy [condition], grouped by [context]. Returns [default] if none match. If the end goal is to determine if there is at least one row, it is more efficient to use ANY.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Boolean expression selecting rows.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Value used if no matches occur.

name: COUNTUNIQUE
description: Counts distinct values of [value] within each [context] group.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Attribute or expression for distinct counting.

name: COUNTUNIQUEIF
description: Counts distinct values of [value] that satisfy [condition], per [context]. Uses [default] when the condition selects none.

errors: BOOL_REQUIRED: [condition] must evaluate to TRUE/FALSE within the context.

name: MAX
description: Returns the maximum of [value] within each [context] group.

name: MAXIF
description: Returns the maximum of [value] among rows satisfying [condition], per [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: MAXVAL
description: Selects the item with the maximum [value1] and returns its [value2], grouped by [context].

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: Key used for selecting the max item.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: Value returned from the selected item.

examples.natural_language: Return the user with the longest event per activity.

name: MAXVALIF
description: Among items satisfying [condition], selects the item with maximum [value1] and returns [value2], grouped by [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: MIN
description: Returns the minimum of [value] within each [context] group.

name: MINIF
description: Returns the minimum of [value] among rows satisfying [condition], per [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: MINVAL
description: Selects the item with the minimum [value1] and returns its [value2], grouped by [context].

name: MINVALIF
description: Among items satisfying [condition], selects the item with minimum [value1] and returns [value2], grouped by [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: RANGE
description: Returns the range (max − min) of [value] per [context] group.

name: RANGEIF
description: Returns the range (max − min) of [value] for items fulfilling [condition], grouped by [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: STDEV
description: Calculates the standard deviation of [value] per [context] group.

name: STDEVIF
description: Calculates the standard deviation of [value] restricted by [condition], per [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: SUM
description: Sums [value] within each group determined by [context].

name: SUMIF
description: Sums [value] that satisfy [condition], per [context]. Uses [default] when none match.

name: FIRST
description: Returns the first [value] within each group determined by [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

name: FIRSTIF
description: Returns the first [value] that meets the [condition], grouped according to the [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The condition under which the [value] is included in the calculation.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Value to be returned when condition is not met.

name: LAST
description: Returns the last [value] within each group determined by [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

name: LASTIF
description: Returns the last value that meets the [condition], grouped according to the [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The condition under which the [value] is included in the calculation.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Value to be returned when condition is not met.

name: SELFLOOP
description: Calculates a count of self-loop events, grouped according to the [context]; short version of COUNTIF(ISSELFLOOP()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: LOOP
description: Calculates a count of loop events, grouped according to the [context]; short version of COUNTIF(ISLOOP()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: REWORK
description: Calculates a count of rework events, grouped according to the [context]; short version of COUNTIF(ISREWORK()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: LOOPINFLOW
description: Calculates a count of loop inflows, grouped according to the [context]; short version of COUNTIF(ISLOOPINFLOW()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: LOOPOUTFLOW
description: Calculates a count of loop outflows, grouped according to the [context]; short version of COUNTIF(ISLOOPOUTFLOW()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: NETLOOPGAIN
description: Calculates the sum of loop gains, grouped according to the [context]; short version of SUM(LOOPGAIN()) expression.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: An attribute name; if no attribute is defined, the current activity (mining) attribute is used.

name: MODE
description: Returns the most common [value] from [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

name: MODEIF
description: Returns the most common [value] from data elements that meet the [condition] in the [context].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The condition under which the [value] is included in the calculation.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: An attribute name, nested operation, or expression.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value returned when no element in defined [context] meets the [condition].

name: ALL
description: Returns true if all values, grouped according to the [context], meet the [condition].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated (supported: process, case, event, edge).

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The condition under which the [value] is included in the calculation.

examples.natural_language: Returns true if all events in the case have an event cost greater than zero.

name: ANY
description: Returns true if any of the values, grouped according to the [context], meet the [condition].

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: The context in which the operation is calculated (supported: case [implicit]).

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The condition under which the [value] is included in the calculation.

examples.natural_language: Returns true if any event in the case has an event cost greater than zero.

name: START
description: Returns the start timestamp of the current process/event/case/path, depending on context.

name: END
description: Returns the end timestamp of the current process/event/case/path, depending on context.

name: DURATION
description: Returns the duration of the current process/event/case/path, depending on context.

name: EVENTCOUNT
description: Returns the number of events in the current scope (process or event context).

name: CASECOUNT
description: Returns the number of cases in the process (process context).

name: ACTIVETIME
description: Returns active time of the case (case context).

name: WAITINGTIME
description: Returns waiting time of the case (case context).

name: ISPARALLEL
description: Returns TRUE if parallelism is present—at least one overlapping event in the current case; or for an event, if it overlaps with another.

name: ISPARALLELWITH
description: Returns TRUE if the current event is parallel with another event satisfying [condition].

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Predicate over the other event.

name: UTILIZATION
description: Returns case utilization (0..1).

name: PARALLELUTILIZATION
description: Returns cumulative case utilization; can exceed 1 when parallel events overlap.

name: REWORKCOUNT
description: Returns total count of reworks (loops and self-loops) within the case; optional attribute defines repetition basis (default is mining attribute).

name: LOOPCOUNT
description: Returns count of loops in the case; optional attribute defines repetition basis (default mining attribute).

name: SELFLOOPCOUNT
description: Returns count of self-loops in the case; optional attribute defines repetition basis (default mining attribute).

name: OCCURRENCE
description: Returns the occurrence index of the event's attribute value within its case; optional attribute selects the repetition basis (default mining attribute).

name: ISSELFLOOP
description: Returns TRUE when the current event/edge has a self-loop repetition for the given attribute (default mining attribute).

name: ISLOOP
description: Returns TRUE when the current event/edge is part of a loop repetition for the given attribute (default mining attribute).

name: ISREWORK
description: Returns TRUE when the current event/edge is a rework (loop or self-loop) for the given attribute (default mining attribute).

name: ISLOOPINFLOW
description: Returns TRUE when the current event/edge has loop inflow for the given attribute (default mining attribute).

name: ISLOOPOUTFLOW
description: Returns TRUE when the current event/edge has loop outflow for the given attribute (default mining attribute).

name: LOOPGAIN
description: Returns +1 if loop outflow without inflow; −1 if inflow without outflow; otherwise 0 (event context).

name: MEDIAN
description: Estimates the median of [value] per [context]; [compression] controls accuracy and memory (20..1000, default 200).

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: One of process|case|event|edge.

name: QUANTILE
description: Estimates the q-th quantile (0..1) of [value] per [context]; optional [compression] (20..1000, default 200).

name: CDF
description: Estimates the cumulative distribution function for [value] at threshold [x] within [context]; optional [compression] (20..1000, default 200).

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Threshold; same type as value.

name: ISFINISHED
description: Returns TRUE when the case is categorized as finished (per Process Context → Case Categorization).

name: ISRUNNING
description: Returns TRUE when the case is categorized as running (per Process Context → Case Categorization).

name: ISSTUCK
description: Returns TRUE when the case is categorized as stuck (per Process Context → Case Categorization).

name: ISINCOMPLETEIMPORT
description: Returns TRUE when the case is categorized as import incomplete (per Process Context → Case Categorization).

name: STATS
description: Returns calculated process statistics according to the selected aggregation and type of statistics.

parameters.name: Aggregate
parameters.description: Aggregation by which the process statistics will be calculated. Allowed values: Sum, Avg, Min, Max, Range, Stdev.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: The type of statistics used in the calculation. Allowed values: CaseStart, CaseEnd, CaseDuration, CaseActiveTime, CaseWaitingTime, CaseUtilization, EventCount.

semantics.notes: Supported context: process. Aggregate options: Sum, Avg, Min, Max, Range, Stdev. Type options: CaseStart, CaseEnd, CaseDuration, CaseActiveTime, CaseWaitingTime, CaseUtilization, EventCount.

examples.natural_language: Calculate average case duration across the process
Get maximum event count per case in the process

name: TODATE
description: Creates a DATE from year, month, and day components.

name: TODATE
description: Creates a DATE from year, month, day and time parts (hour, minute, second, millisecond).

name: TODATE
description: Creates a DATE from year, month, day and a TIME argument.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time part as numeric time unit (per docs).

name: TOTIME
description: Creates a TIME interval from hour, minute, second, millisecond parts.

name: TOTIMEFROMDAYS
description: Creates a TIME interval from total days.

name: TOTIMEFROMHOURS
description: Creates a TIME interval from total hours.

name: TOTIMEFROMMINUTES
description: Creates a TIME interval from total minutes.

name: TOTIMEFROMSECONDS
description: Creates a TIME interval from total seconds.

name: TOTIMEFROMMILLIS
description: Creates a TIME interval from total milliseconds.

name: ADDDAYS
description: Adds [count] days to a DATE/TIME.

name: ADDHOURS
description: Adds [count] hours to a DATE/TIME.

name: ADDMILLIS
description: Adds [count] milliseconds to a DATE/TIME.

name: ADDMINUTES
description: Adds [count] minutes to a DATE/TIME.

name: ADDMONTHS
description: Adds [count] months to a DATE/TIME (fractional values ignored).

name: ADDSECONDS
description: Adds [count] seconds to a DATE/TIME.

name: ADDYEARS
description: Adds [count] years to a DATE/TIME (fractional values ignored).

name: DATE
description: Extracts the date component from a DATE (drops time-of-day).

name: DAY
description: Returns the day-of-month from a DATE.

name: DAYOFWEEK
description: Returns the day-of-week (integer) from a DATE.

name: DAYOFYEAR
description: Returns the ordinal day-of-year from a DATE.

name: HOUR
description: Returns the hour from a DATE.

name: MINUTE
description: Returns the minute from a DATE.

name: SECOND
description: Returns the second from a DATE.

name: MILLISECOND
description: Returns the millisecond from a DATE.

name: TIMEOFDAY
description: Returns the time-of-day component as a TIME interval from a DATE.

name: WEEKOFYEAR
description: Returns ISO week-of-year number from a DATE.

name: YEAR
description: Returns the year from a DATE.

name: ISLEAPYEAR
description: Returns TRUE if [year] is a leap year.

name: DAYS
description: Extracts the whole days component from a TIME interval.

name: HOURS
description: Extracts the whole hours component from a TIME interval.

name: MINUTES
description: Extracts the whole minutes component from a TIME interval.

name: SECONDS
description: Extracts the whole seconds component from a TIME interval.

name: MILLISECONDS
description: Extracts the whole milliseconds component from a TIME interval.

name: TOTALDAYS
description: Converts TIME interval to total days (possibly fractional).

name: TOTALHOURS
description: Converts TIME interval to total hours (possibly fractional).

name: TOTALMILLIS
description: Converts TIME interval to total milliseconds (possibly fractional).

name: TOTALMINUTES
description: Converts TIME interval to total minutes (possibly fractional).

name: TOTALSECONDS
description: Converts TIME interval to total seconds (possibly fractional).

name: QUARTER
description: Returns the quarter-of-year from a DATE.

name: MONTH
description: Returns the month from a DATE.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date from which the month is returned.

name: ISWORKINGHOUR
description: Returns TRUE when dateTime belongs to working hours defined in the actual calendar.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: The date to be evaluated.

name: ISWORKINGDAY
description: Returns TRUE when date belongs to working day defined in the actual calendar.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date to be evaluated.

semantics.notes: Return type documented as FLOAT but logically should be BOOL.

name: ISPUBLICHOLIDAY
description: Returns TRUE when date belongs to public holiday defined in the actual calendar.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date to be evaluated.

semantics.notes: Return type documented as FLOAT but logically should be BOOL.

name: DURATIONCALENDAR
description: Returns working time duration between two dates calculated using actual calendar. Calculations work correctly only in the range from process start minus 6 months to process end plus 24 months.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of timespan.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of timespan.

semantics.notes: Calendar calculations return correct results only within 6 months before process start to 24 months after process end. Outside this range returns error and default value.

name: ADDWORKINGDAYS
description: Adds the specified number of working days to the date. Any day marked as working day is counted as one, regardless of defined working hours.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: A specific date to which working days are added.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of working days to add.

semantics.notes: Calendar calculations return correct results only within 6 months before process start to 24 months after process end. Outside this range returns error and default value.

name: ADDWORKINGHOURS
description: Adds the specified number of working hours to the date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: A specific date to which working hours are added.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of working hours to add.

semantics.notes: Calendar calculations return correct results only within 6 months before process start to 24 months after process end. Outside this range returns error and default value.

name: ADDWORKINGMINUTES
description: Adds the specified number of working minutes to the date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: A specific date to which working minutes are added.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of working minutes to add.

semantics.notes: Calendar calculations return correct results only within 6 months before process start to 24 months after process end. Outside this range returns error and default value.

name: ABS
description: Returns the absolute value of the number.

name: CEIL
description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to the given number.

name: FLOOR
description: Returns the greatest integer less than or equal to the given number.

name: MAX2
description: Returns the maximum of two values.

name: MIN2
description: Returns the minimum of two values.

name: LOG
description: Returns the logarithm of [value] to the specified [base].

name: POWER
description: Returns [value] raised to the power [exponent].

name: ROUND
description: Rounds [value] to the specified number of [digits].

name: SIGN
description: Returns −1 if value < 0, 0 if value = 0, 1 if value > 0.

name: SQR
description: Returns the square (second power) of [value].

name: SQRT
description: Returns the square root of [value].

name: TRUNCATE
description: Returns the integer part of [value] (rounded toward zero).

name: CONCAT
description: Concatenates multiple strings.

name: CONTAINS
description: Returns TRUE if [string] contains [value].

name: ENDSWITH
description: Returns TRUE if [string] ends with [value].

name: LEFT
description: Returns the leftmost [count] characters of [string].

name: LEN
description: Returns the length of [string].

name: LOWER
description: Converts [string] to lower case.

name: LTRIM
description: Removes leading whitespace from [string].

name: RIGHT
description: Returns the rightmost [count] characters of [string].

name: RTRIM
description: Removes trailing whitespace from [string].

name: STARTSWITH
description: Returns TRUE if [string] starts with [value].

name: SUBSTRING
description: Returns a substring of [string] starting at [start] with length [count].

name: TOINT
description: Converts [string] to an integer; returns 0 or [default] on conversion error.

name: TOSTRING_INT
description: Converts an INT to a STRING, with optional format pattern.

name: TOSTRING_FLOAT
description: Converts a FLOAT to a STRING, with optional format pattern.

name: TOSTRING_BOOL
description: Converts a BOOL to a STRING ("True" or "False").

name: TOSTRING_DATE
description: Converts a DATE to a STRING using an optional date format.

name: TOSTRING_TIME
description: Converts a TIME interval to a STRING using an optional time format.

name: TRIM
description: Removes whitespace from both ends of [string].

name: UPPER
description: Converts [string] to upper case.

name: GETVALUE
description: Returns the event/case attribute value by its name (useful when attribute names contain spaces).

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: Literal attribute name.

examples.natural_language: Access attribute with spaces

name: ATTRIBUTENAME_LITERAL
description: Direct reference to an attribute by identifier (without spaces or special characters). Use simple identifier syntax without brackets.

examples.natural_language: Reference attribute without brackets
Compare attribute value
Filter by attribute

name: IF
description: Evaluates one or more conditions in sequence and returns the corresponding result for the first condition that evaluates to TRUE. If none of the conditions are met, returns the defaultResult.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Boolean value or expression to evaluate.

parameters.name: thenResult
parameters.description: Value returned if the associated condition is TRUE.

parameters.name: defaultResult
parameters.description: Value returned if no conditions are met.

examples.natural_language: If the case contains more than 10 events, returns 'Complex', otherwise 'Simple'
Returns 'Very Complex' if event count > 20, 'Complex' if event count > 10, 'Simple' otherwise

semantics.notes: Applicable on the case overview statistics screen for dynamic classification based on multiple thresholds or conditions.

name: SWITCH
description: Compares an input value against a series of specified matches and returns the corresponding result for the first match found. If no matches are found, returns the defaultResult.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The expression or value to evaluate.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description: A value to compare against the input value.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Value returned if the corresponding match equals the input value.

parameters.name: defaultResult
parameters.description: Value returned if no matches are found.

examples.natural_language: Returns 50 if Activity = 'A', 100 if Activity = 'B', 0 if Activity does not match any specified value

semantics.notes: Ideal for mapping discrete values to specific outcomes without nested IF statements, improving readability and maintainability.

name: SOURCE
description: Changes evaluation context to the initial event of the current path (edges only) for the enclosed [operation].

name: TARGET
description: Changes evaluation context to the ending event of the current path (edges only) for the enclosed [operation].

name: CASE
description: Changes evaluation context to the case of the current event/path for the enclosed [operation] (events and paths only).

examples.natural_language: Calculate ratio of event duration to case duration

name: FIRSTEVENT
description: Changes evaluation context to the first event of the case (only allowed for cases).

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Value to be calculated on the context of the first event in the case.

examples.natural_language: Get duration of the first event in each case

name: LASTEVENT
description: Changes evaluation context to the last event of the case (only allowed for cases).

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Value to be calculated on the context of the last event in the case.

examples.natural_language: Get duration of the last event in each case

name: PROCESS
description: Changes evaluation context to the process level.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Value to be calculated in the context of the actual process.

semantics.notes: Supported context: process, case, event, edge.

examples.natural_language: Get total number of events in the current process

name: IN
description: Returns TRUE if the operation equals any of the given values. Shortened version of logical OR operations.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Value to be compared.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: First comparison value.

parameters.name: valueN
parameters.description: Additional comparison values (all must be same type as operation).

examples.natural_language: Count events where userName is Peter, Martin, or Laura

name: NEXT
description: Returns the value of the next event in the case. If next event doesn't exist, returns default value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated in the context of the next event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if no next event exists.

examples.natural_language: Get cost of next event, or 0 if current is last

name: NEXTIF
description: Returns the value of the first next event in the case that meets the condition. If no such event exists, returns default value.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Condition for event selection.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated from the matching next event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if no matching next event exists.

examples.natural_language: Get cost of next event done by Laura, or 0 if none

name: PREVIOUS
description: Returns value of the previous event in the case. If previous event doesn't exist, returns default value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated in the context of the previous event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if no previous event exists.

examples.natural_language: Get userName from previous event, or n/a if current is first

name: PREVIOUSIF
description: Returns value of the first previous event in the case that meets the condition. If no such event exists, returns default value.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Condition for event selection.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated from the matching previous event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if no matching previous event exists.

examples.natural_language: Get userName from previous event with cost > 0, or n/a if none

name: MOVE
description: Returns the value of the event retrieved by offset. Offset 1 = next event, -1 = previous, 0 = current. Returns default if event doesn't exist.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset to current event (1=next, -1=previous, 0=current).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated in the context of the specified event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if event at offset doesn't exist.

examples.natural_language: Sum of event costs for the next two events

name: MOVEIF
description: Returns the value of the event satisfying the condition retrieved by offset. Offset 1 = next matching, -1 = previous matching, 0 = current matching. Returns default if no such event exists.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Event offset (1=next matching, -1=previous matching, 0=current matching).

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Condition for event selection.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to be calculated from the matching event.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Default value if no matching event at offset exists.

examples.natural_language: Get event cost for the third next event done by Laura, or 0 if none
